description: Object-oriented multi-paradigm simulation software with strong manufacturing, healthcare, mining, and logistics capabilities. Known for its process modeling library and data-driven approach.
typical_use_cases: manufacturing, healthcare, logistics, mining, supply chain

description: Multi-method simulation platform supporting discrete event, agent-based, and system dynamics modeling. Strong in complex systems and multi-scale simulation.
typical_use_cases: supply chain, manufacturing, healthcare, transportation, business process

description: Classical discrete-event simulation software with long academic and industrial history. Strong in manufacturing and healthcare workflows.
typical_use_cases: manufacturing, healthcare, service operations, business process

description: 3D discrete-event simulation software with strong visualization for manufacturing and warehousing applications.
Process-focused business simulation software emphasizing ease of use for non-programmers. Strong in healthcare and service operations.
typical_use_cases: healthcare, service operations, business process, contact centers

description: Discrete-event simulation software for manufacturing and healthcare applications. Known for its ease of use and industry-specific templates.
Discrete-event simulation platform with strong manufacturing and supply chain heritage. Part of the Lanner simulation suite.
3D manufacturing simulation and robot programming platform. Strong for factory layout, robot cell design, and physical production systems.
typical_use_cases: manufacturing, robotics, factory layout, material handling

description: Part of the Siemens Tecnomatix portfolio. Discrete-event simulation for analyzing production systems and logistics operations.
typical_use_cases: manufacturing, automotive production, logistics, supply chain

description: Process-based discrete-event simulation framework built on Python generators. Lightweight, extensible, and widely used for teaching and research.
typical_use_cases: teaching, research, lightweight modeling, M/M/1 examples, prototype simulations

description: Process-based discrete-event simulation package for Python with built-in animation. Positioned as a more feature-rich alternative to SimPy for teaching and visualization.
Discrete-event simulation library specialized for queueing networks. Rich analytical features and reproducibility focus.
typical_use_cases: queueing networks, research, teaching, network analysis

description: Free and open-source desktop discrete-event simulation software. Drag-and-drop modeling with scripting extensions.
typical_use_cases: teaching, research, desktop modeling, general simulation

description: Diagramming-tool-native discrete-event simulation platform. Integrates with LucidChart, Miro, and diagrams.net to turn process diagrams into runnable DES models with simulation executed by a Python engine.
typical_use_cases: business process, manufacturing, healthcare, supply chain, service operations
